zh.Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ar: 法國哈帕格-亞登芒內a利-素-馬內
zh.Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France: 法國哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Chatillon Comtesse de Brienne於1281年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內a利-素-馬內時，她的父親Gaucher V de Châtillon29歲，母親Isabelle de Dreux17歲。她於1305年10月之前與Gauthier V de Brienne Comte de Brienne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1354年1月16日在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Chatillon Comtesse de Brienne于1281年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內a利-素-馬內时，她的父亲Gaucher V de Châtillon29岁，母亲Isabelle de Dreux17岁。她于1305年10月之前与Gauthier V de Brienne Comte de Brienne结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1354年1月16日在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Chatillon Comtesse de Brienne was born in 1281, in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Gaucher V de Châtillon, was 29 and her mother, Isabelle de Dreux, was 17. She married Gauthier V de Brienne Comte de Brienne before October 1305. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 16 January 1354, in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Chatillon Comtesse de Brienne est née en 1281, à Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Gaucher V de Châtillon, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Dreux, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Gauthier V de Brienne Comte de Brienne avant octobre 1305. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 janvier 1354, à Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Chatillon Comtesse de Brienne 1281 in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gaucher V de Châtillon 29 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Dreux 17. Sie hat vor Oktober 1305 Gauthier V de Brienne Comte de Brienne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. Januar 1354 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Chatillon Comtesse de Brienne è nata il nel 1281 nel Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Gaucher V de Châtillon, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Dreux, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Gauthier V de Brienne Comte de Brienne prima del ottobre 1305. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 gennaio 1354, nel Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ar: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンチaティロン-スル-マルン

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Chatillon Comtesse de Brienneが1281年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンチaティロン-スル-マルンで生まれた時，父Gaucher V de Châtillonは29歳，母Isabelle de Dreuxは17歳であった。1305年10月以前にGauthier V de Brienne Comte de Brienneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1354年1月16日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベトロイスで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Chatillon Comtesse de Brienne(이)가 1281년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 cha틸론-수-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gaucher V de Châtillon(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Dreux(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1305년 10월 이전 Gauthier V de Brienne Comte de Brienne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1354년 1월 16일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 트로예스에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Chatillon Comtesse de Brienne nasceu em 1281, em Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Gaucher V de Châtillon, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Dreux, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Gauthier V de Brienne Comte de Brienne antes outubro de 1305. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1354, em Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Chatillon Comtesse de Brienne родилась в 1281 г. в местности чaтиллон-сур-марн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Gaucher V de Châtillon было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Dreux, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gauthier V de Brienne Comte de Brienne перед октябрь 1305 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 января 1354 г. в местности троиесь, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Chatillon Comtesse de Brienne nació en 1281, en Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Gaucher V de Châtillon, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Dreux, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Gauthier V de Brienne Comte de Brienne antes de octubre de 1305. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de enero de 1354, en Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 73 años.
